Notice Of Motion And Motion To Dismiss Or In The Alternative Stay Plaintiffs Complaint Based On Prior Filed Arbitration
Off Calendar Dec-03-2021 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

APPEARANCES (VIA ZOOM VIDEOCONFERENCE):
Plaintiff ELMER FERGUSON (Tel: 619-980-2074) in pro per;
Atty. BENJAMIN A. EMMERT, Esq. of Littler Mendelson, P.C. (Tel: 408-998-4150) for defendants Marsh & McLennan Agency LLC, MMA Securities LLC, Jeffery Calder, and William Peartree.

HEARING RE: DEFENDANTS MARSH & MCLENNAN AGENCY LLC, MMA SECURITIES LLC, JEFFERY CALDER, and WILLIAM PEARTREE's Motion To Dismiss Or In The Alternative Stay Plaintiffs Complaint Based On Prior Filed Arbitration.

Matter argued and submitted. The Court adopts its tentative ruling.

Defendants' motion to stay this lawsuit pending the outcome of a prior-filed arbitration is granted. Code of Civil Procedure 1281.2(d) authorizes a court to stay a suit when its parties are also parties in a pending arbitration. It is undisputed that the arbitration and the suit here involve largely the same facts, so arbitration findings may have preclusive effects. The arbitration has already begun, thus arguments that it is waived are moot.

Order signed.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer, Jr.; Clerk: Sean Kane; Court Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR No. 8600, Email: maria.torreano@gmail.com (302/RBU)
